question: How many model kits have I worked on or bought?
ground_truth_answer: I have worked on or bought five model kits. The scales of the models are: Revell F-15 Eagle (scale not mentioned), Tamiya 1/48 scale Spitfire Mk.V, 1/16 scale German Tiger I tank, 1/72 scale B-29 bomber, and 1/24 scale '69 Camaro.

retrieval_results.context:
The user plans to start working on engine wiring and fuel lines for the 1/24‑scale 1969 Camaro model
The user prefers using thin, flexible wire 0.5 mm to 1.5 mm in diameter for model wire work.
